warnings: CHAIN_POEM_PROVENANCE_SECRET missing: provenance remains unsigned preview only
CHAIN_POEM_LINE_RECEIPT_CONTRACT missing: Base line NFT mint remains disabled
CHAIN_POEM_LINE_RECEIPT_SIGNER missing: Base line NFT mint remains disabled
CHAIN_POEM_LINE_RECEIPT_BASE_URI missing: Base line NFT metadata remains disabled

operatorActionChecklist.why: Farcaster account association, manifest asset URLs, deployment verification, and client receipts all bind to one exact HTTPS origin.

operatorActionChecklist.valueShape: three strings from the Farcaster Mini App manifest tool for the exact domain
operatorActionChecklist.why: Farcaster/Base clients need a signed accountAssociation before the mini app can be treated as production-ready.

operatorActionChecklist.valueShape: Vercel token with permission to deploy this project
operatorActionChecklist.why: The current app uses Node-style api/*.mjs routes, so Vercel is the preferred ready path.
Without it, provenance hashes work as unsigned preview receipts; with it, the server can sign poem provenance.

operatorActionChecklist.valueShape: Base ERC-1155 contract address, authorized signer, and metadata base URI
operatorActionChecklist.why: These remain optional until the poem experience is live. Without them, every line receipt mint plan stays dormant with mintAllowed=false.

operatorActionChecklist.valueShape: filled from data/client-verification.template.json after live Farcaster/Base client testing
operatorActionChecklist.why: Optional acceptance evidence after deployment: real launch, composeCast, Quick Auth/provenance, standard-web fallback, share fallback, and paid mint disabled.

commandPath: Set FARCASTER_ACCOUNT_ASSOCIATION_HEADER/PAYLOAD/SIGNATURE from the Farcaster manifest tool
Optionally fill data/client-verification.json with live client evidence
next: Provide the missing production inputs, then rerun npm run operator:release-brief and npm run deploy:production:dry-run.
